message:
fix(tui): hoist unicode_width imports above early-return and usage sites

Move scoped use statements for UnicodeWidthChar (tree.rs) and
UnicodeWidthStr (view.rs) to the top of their enclosing blocks,
before any early returns or dependent code, matching conventional
import placement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
